scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev out --d1 DB --compatibility-date=2026-05-05 --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/state
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute kazashitego-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute kazashitego-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_add_scan_events.sql && wrangler d1 execute kazashitego-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_add_users_points_and_campaigns.sql && wrangler d1 execute kazashitego-db --local --file=./migrations/0004_add_three_sample_nfc_tags.sql && wrangler d1 execute kazashitego-db --local --file=./migrations/0005_reset_rewards_on_japan_day.sql
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy out
